"use client";

import { Menu } from "lucide-react"

import { Button, Sheet, SheetClose, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetTrigger } from "@nebutra/ui/primitives";
import Link from "next/link";
<Sheet>
  <SheetTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="icon">
      <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
    </Button>
  </SheetTrigger>
  <SheetContent side="left" className="w-64">
    <SheetHeader>
      <SheetTitle>Navigation</SheetTitle>
    </SheetHeader>
    <nav className="flex flex-col gap-2 mt-4">
      <SheetClose asChild>
        <Link href="/docs/components/sheet">Dashboard</Link>
      </SheetClose>
      <SheetClose asChild>
        <Link href="/docs/components/sheet">Settings</Link>
      </SheetClose>
    </nav>
  </SheetContent>
</Sheet>

export function SheetSideDemo() {
  return null; // Update this with actual rendering logic
}
